message:
✨ Add environment prerequisites checklist to Developer channel settings (#1284)

Shows visible status indicators for kc-agent, coding agent, OAuth, install
mode, and git cleanliness — so a screenshot immediately reveals if all
prerequisites are met for receiving update notifications from main.

Also fixes the Check Now refresh icon to animate exactly 1 full turn
(using animate-spin-min, matching the card refresh pattern) instead of
continuous spinning.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

       "updateFailed": "Update failed",
       "devMode": "Dev Mode",
       "binaryMode": "Binary",

+      "prereqKCAgent": "kc-agent",

+      "prereqCodingAgent": "Coding agent",

+      "prereqCodingAgentFail": "Not detected",
+      "prereqOAuth": "OAuth",
+      "prereqOAuthOk": "Configured",
+      "prereqOAuthFail": "Not configured",
+      "prereqInstall": "Install mode",

+      "prereqInstallFail": "Not source mode",
+      "prereqGitClean": "Git status",
+      "prereqGitCleanOk": "Clean",
+      "prereqGitCleanFail": "Uncommitted changes",
+      "allPrereqsMet": "All prerequisites met — update notifications active",
+      "prereqsMissing": "{{count}} prerequisite(s) not met — some features unavailable"
     },
     "theme": {
       "title": "Appearance",
